.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 features or compatibility; the old JDK 11 image does not provide the target runtime environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which uses apk instead of apt-get; using apt-get would fail at runtime.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install bash explicitly as it is not included by default in the minimal Alpine image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Subsequent commands and scripts rely on bash, which is missing in the default Alpine environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven explicitly since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the application, and it is no longer provided by the base image.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Missing C++ standard library runtime can cause UnsatisfiedLinkError or similar runtime failures for native components.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace NodeSource setup script with NVM to install Node.js, adapting to the Alpine environment.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous NodeSource script was for Debian/Ubuntu and Node 12; the new setup uses NVM to install Node 16 on Alpine.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or compatible with the new build strategy.
Update the container entrypoint to run the specific application JAR file instead of a generic bash shell.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to execute the application; the previous CMD was a placeholder for debugging.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add steps to copy source code and build the application within the Docker image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The image needs to contain the compiled application artifact to run.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app
RUN mvn -B -Pproduction -Ph2 -DskipTests -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Explicitly define the Storybook framework as react-webpack5, which is required for newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to incompatibility or changed build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: const WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning = require("./webpack-plugin-fail-build-on-warning"); ... webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize Mock Service Worker with the determined service worker URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.
Add mswLoader to the preview loaders array to integrate Mock Service Worker with Storybook stories.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this, the project may compile with older Java features or fail to utilize Java 21 specific optimizations/flags if enforced by build plugins.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); using it causes compilation errors or runtime failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud Gateway MVC version to 4.1.3 to match Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Cloud versions are incompatible with Spring Boot 3's dependency management and Jakarta EE namespaces.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation dependency to handle potential legacy validation API references during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE (jakarta.validation); explicit javax.validation might be needed for specific legacy compatibility or test mocking if not fully migrated, though often this is a transitional step.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin to v16.20.0 for better compatibility with modern build tools.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration to the build process.
Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Refactor pom.xml structure with comments and organized sections for better readability.
Add new Maven profiles (wiremock, integration) for different testing environments.
Update Surefire plugin configuration to use TCP for event transmission to fix potential test execution issues.
Configure Jacoco plugin with more comprehensive exclusion rules for coverage reporting.
Add explicit mainClass configuration to Spring Boot and Jar plugins for executable JAR generation.
